title: Senior Doctor - Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates!
